title: Personal Card
description: Create variables for your name, age, and favorite color. Print each on a separate line. Then update the age by adding 1 and print the new age.
starterCode:

# Print them

solution:
name = "Lakshanya"
age = 20
fav_color = "Blue"
print(name)
print(age)
print(fav_color)
age = age + 1
print(age)
